title: Define agent protocol commands and relayhq CLI surface
acceptance_criteria: CLI can list ready tasks, claim work, update status, heartbeat, and request approval
Task selection only returns items assigned to the caller and free of dependency blockers
Command surface matches the control-plane boundary and does not run agent work itself
CLI behavior is covered by tests for selection and writeback flows
completion_summary: Defined control-plane CLI commands with task selection and writeback intents
